title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・渾身のロングラン

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... I cannot believe this... My dream remains unfulfilled!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: And she was the one who stopped me...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the winner is Mejiro Ryan! Mejiro Ryan takes
first place! What an outstanding showdown
between the fan-favorite Mejiros!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... I can't go on, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I can barely breathe... And my muscles...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... That distance, this competition... It was so
tough...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I think my body's gonna fall apart... Pant, pant, huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If it really took this much out of you, then I
suppose I can accept my loss.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Nothing vexes me more than to say this, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If someone had to get in the way of my dream, I'm
glad that it was you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I reiterate that it pains me to say it! And I am not pleased about it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: S-sorry, McQueen... But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any regrets. This race was just as
important to me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...I know it was. I would never forgive you if you
held back today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Do you understand what this means? From now on, I'll be the one catching up to you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Right... I don't know how long I can keep this up...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I'll do whatever I can to stay in front! Like you
always did.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't want it any other way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I will be the one who surpasses you,
and at the distance you excel in.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well, then. Take care.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan pushes herself past her shortcomings
to claim victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next objective is the Takarazuka Kinen. After
today's great achievement, getting the top rank
in the fan vote is no longer a dream.
